Cerebrospinal Fluid (CSF) Analysis 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/cerebrospinal-fluid-csf-analysis/ 
Cerebrospinal Fluid (CSF) Analysis 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) analysis? 
A cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) analysis tests a sample of your CSF for diseases that affect the brain and spinal cord, which make up your central nervous system. Your central nervous system controls and coordinates everything you do, including your ability to move, breathe,
